name: Mud Pie
recipeIngredient: 25 Chocolate Wafer Cookies (8 1/2 Oz. Pkg), crushed
1/4 Cup (1/2 Stick) Butter Or Margarine, softened
1/2 Gallon Coffee Ice Cream, slightly softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs and butter in a medium bowl using a fork to cut in the butter.
2. Press the mixture firmly over the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate, then chill.
3. Soften the ice cream slightly in a chilled bowl until it is just spreadable.
4. Spoon the softened ice cream into the chilled crust, smoothing the surface.
5. Freeze the pie until firm.
6. Drizzle the fudge topping over the frozen pie and return to the freezer.
7. To serve: Top with whipped cream and toasted sliced almonds.
